name: Glimepiride And Metformin Hydrochloride SR Tablets
about: Glimepiride And Metformin Hydrochloride SR Tablets are a combination medication used to manage type 2 diabetes. These tablets come in a solid dosage form and are manufactured in India. Glimepiride And Metformin Hydrochloride SR Tablets are classified as general medicines and are available in a convenient tablet form. These tablets are designed to be stored in a dry place to maintain their quality and efficacy.

faq.q: What are Glimepiride And Metformin Hydrochloride SR Tablets used for?
faq.a: Glimepiride And Metformin Hydrochloride SR Tablets are used to manage type 2 diabetes.

faq.q: What is the dosage form of Glimepiride And Metformin Hydrochloride SR Tablets?
faq.a: Glimepiride And Metformin Hydrochloride SR Tablets come in a solid dosage form.

faq.q: Where are Glimepiride And Metformin Hydrochloride SR Tablets manufactured?
faq.a: Glimepiride And Metformin Hydrochloride SR Tablets are manufactured in India.

faq.q: How should Glimepiride And Metformin Hydrochloride SR Tablets be stored?
faq.a: Glimepiride And Metformin Hydrochloride SR Tablets should be stored in a dry place.

faq.q: What type of medication are Glimepiride And Metformin Hydrochloride SR Tablets classified as?
faq.a: Glimepiride And Metformin Hydrochloride SR Tablets are classified as general medicines.
